Package org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    NodeShadowPainter
    This interface represents any figure that may be drawn in a shadow mode.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    BitmapNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
    Node figure that is displaying a bitmap.
    CircleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
    Node figure that is displaying a circle.
    EllipseNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
    Node figure that is displaying an ellipse.
    NodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
    Abstract class to present a node in a diagram.
    RectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
    Node figure that is displaying a rectangle.
    RoundRectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
    Node figure that is displaying a round rectangle.
    SquareNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
    Node figure that is displaying a square.
